title: Cursor, insertion point, and fixing mistakes
drDigitalIntro:
When you type, watch for the blinking line called the insertion point.
• Your next letter appears there.
• Click somewhere to move the insertion point there.
• Made a mistake? Press Delete and try again — everyone makes typos!

playgroundTask.instructions: Put it all together! Type the sentence below exactly as shown — watch your insertion point, fix any mistakes with Delete, and take your time.
playgroundTask.targetText: I am learning to use a computer and it is fun!

drDigitalSuccess: Look at that — a whole sentence, typed out perfectly! You know how to place your cursor, type, and fix mistakes.
drDigitalHint: Type exactly: I am learning to use a computer and it is fun! — remember to capitalize the I at the start and include the exclamation point at the end. If you make a mistake, use Delete to erase it.
